name: General Task
description: General-purpose workflow for executing any AI-assisted task with structured scanning, planning, execution, validation, and reporting

steps.title: Scan project context
steps.description: Scan the workspace to understand project structure, existing files, configuration, and relevant context for the task
steps.expectedResult: Project context scanned and summarized for planning
steps.expectedOutputDescription: Workspace scan summary with relevant files and context
acceptanceCriteria: Project structure and relevant context have been identified
steps.finalOutputContribution: Provides context for all subsequent planning and execution steps

steps.title: Understand requirements
steps.description: Analyze the user prompt and identify key requirements, constraints, and expected outcomes
steps.expectedOutputDescription: Documented requirements extracted from the user prompt
acceptanceCriteria: Requirements are clearly documented with acceptance criteria
steps.finalOutputContribution: Defines what success looks like for the entire workflow

steps.title: Create execution plan
steps.description: Design a detailed plan with specific steps, dependencies, expected outputs, and validation criteria
steps.expectedResult: Execution plan with clear steps and expected outputs
steps.expectedOutputDescription: Detailed execution plan with steps and deliverables
acceptanceCriteria: Plan has concrete steps with expected outputs
steps.finalOutputContribution: Guides all execution steps with a clear roadmap

steps.title: Execute implementation
steps.description: Carry out the planned work by creating, modifying, or producing the required outputs
steps.expectedResult: All planned outputs have been produced
steps.expectedOutputDescription: All implementation outputs produced during execution
steps.finalOutputContribution: Produces the core deliverables of the workflow

steps.title: Validate outputs
steps.description: Verify that outputs match acceptance criteria, expected results, and quality standards
steps.inputContext: Expected outputs, acceptance criteria, implementation results
steps.expectedResult: All outputs pass validation against acceptance criteria
steps.expectedOutputDescription: Validation results showing pass/fail for each criterion
steps.finalOutputContribution: Confirms quality and correctness of all outputs

steps.title: Handle issues if any
steps.description: Address any validation failures, unexpected issues, or missing outputs discovered during validation
steps.expectedResult: All issues are resolved or documented with decisions
steps.expectedOutputDescription: Issue resolution summary with decisions made

steps.title: Generate final report
steps.description: Produce a comprehensive final report summarizing what was done, what changed, validation results, and next steps
steps.inputContext: All previous step outputs, validation results
steps.expectedResult: Final report produced with complete workflow summary
steps.expectedOutputDescription: Comprehensive final report with summary of all work done
acceptanceCriteria: Final report exists with workflow summary
steps.finalOutputContribution: The final deliverable of the entire workflow
